summary: Verified viewport overflow fix for header 'Catalogue' download button. The claimed code change (sm:→lg:) was NEVER applied. Header.jsx line 59 still reads 'hidden sm:inline-flex'. As a result, at 768px viewport the header-download-catalogue button is still visible and pushes horizontal scrollWidth to 896 (clientWidth 768) — the overflow bug from iteration_5 is UNFIXED.
passed: No horizontal overflow at widths 1920, 1440, 1024, 480, 390 (scrollWidth == clientWidth)
At 768px, all nav items visible: nav-home, nav-catalog, nav-about, nav-contact, nav-admin
At 768px, icon row visible: header-favorites, header-cart (search consolidated into header-search Link)

failed.issue: Fix was not applied. className is still 'hidden sm:inline-flex ...' instead of 'hidden lg:inline-flex ...'. Button remains visible at 768px and causes horizontal overflow (scrollWidth=896, clientWidth=768, ~128px overflow). Homepage AND /catalog both overflow at 768px.
failed.evidence: grep confirms line 59: `className="hidden sm:inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 border border-[#D4AF37]/40 ..."`. Playwright at 768px: header_dl_visible=True (expected False); document.documentElement.scrollWidth=896 vs clientWidth=768. Screenshot shows 'CATAL...' pill button truncated at right edge at 768px.

action_items: Actually apply the change in /app/frontend/src/components/layout/Header.jsx line 59: replace 'hidden sm:inline-flex' with 'hidden lg:inline-flex' on the [data-testid=header-download-catalogue] anchor. Hot reload should pick it up; then re-verify 768px scrollWidth == clientWidth and button hidden.

success_rate.frontend: 85% (7 of 8 checks pass; overflow at 768 remains)
